candidates.title: Sample Collection Study to Aid Evaluation of an Influenza A/B, Respiratory Syncytial Virus & COVID-19 Virus POC Test
candidates.outcome_domain: RSV prevention, immunization, protection, safety, policy, or implementation signal
candidates.key_finding: Collection of Nasal Swabs, Throat Swabs and Saliva Samples from patients presenting at their designated care or testing facility displaying symptoms of either Influenza, Respiratory Syncytial Virus (RSV), SARS-CoV-2 or those who have been in recent contact with SARS-CoV-2 positive patients. Collected samples will aid the development, calibration and performance evaluation of the LumiraDx POC Test.
candidates.evidence_signal: Automated ClinicalTrials.gov inclusion; not manually verified.
candidates.actionability: Rule-classified automated evidence signal. Inspect the source record before clinical, policy, or research decisions.
candidates.evidence_update_basis: ClinicalTrials.gov last-update/posted date within automated lookback window
